html:
A Fish Morsel was introduced to Don't Starve Together in Return of Them. It is dropped by Fish, Runty Guppy, Needlenosed Squirt, Bitty Baitfish, Smolt Fry, Scorching Sunfish, Spittlefish and Crustashine when killed.

It counts as 0.5 Fishes and 0.5 Meats value when used in the Crock Pot. When spoiled, a Fish Morsel or Cooked Fish Morsel turns into a Spoiled Fish Morsel.

Cooked Fish Morsel

A Cooked Fish Morsel is a Fish Morsel that has been cooked over a Campfire, Fire Pit or Star. It can also be used in various Crock Pot recipes.

Small Fishy Jerky

Small Fishy Jerky is acquired by drying Fish Morsel on the Drying Rack. After 15 days, a Small Fishy Jerky spoils and turns into a Spoiled Fish Morsel.

Usage

Trivia

  • Fish Morsels were added to Don't Starve Together in the Hook, Line, and Inker update.

Gallery

  • Fishy Jerky concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

"fishmeat_small"
“A small bit of fish.”
–Wilson, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“I like sushi, but I prefer it flame-broiled.”
–Willow, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Fish lump for eating.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“There are other fish in the sea. Bigger ones, hopefully.”
–Wendy, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“SWIMMING MEAT SWIMS NO MORE”
–WX-78, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Fish flesh.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“I hope I don't attract bears.”
–Woodie, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Have I been reduced to this?”
–Maxwell, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Even miniscule amounts of raw fish will cause my intestines harm.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“This sea meat will serve me well.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“It's a little fishy.”
–Webber, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Small fish from a big pond.”
–Walani, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“I will honor this ingredient.”
–Warly, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“'Tis hardly a bite'o'fish.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“'TIS A TEENY FISH”
–Wilba, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Wee Glub Glub”
–Wormwood, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Just a tiny bit fishy.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“You sure that's fish? Looks pretty shrimpy to me.”
–Winona, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Looks like the soul's already left this one.”
–Wortox, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Was so little...”
–Wurt, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Maybe I could use it as bait for a bigger fish.”
–Walter, when examining a Fish Morsel.
“Not much more than a quick fishy snack.”
–Wanda, when examining a Fish Morsel.
A Fish Morsel was introduced to Don't Starve Together in Return of Them. It is dropped by Fish, Runty Guppy, Needlenosed Squirt, Bitty Baitfish, Smolt Fry, Scorching Sunfish, Spittlefish and Crustashine when killed.
It counts as 0.5 Fishes and 0.5 Meats value when used in the Crock Pot. When spoiled, a Fish Morsel or Cooked Fish Morsel turns into a Spoiled Fish Morsel.
Cooked Fish Morsel[edit | edit source]
Cooked Fish Morsel
Food Info
12.5
1
0

× 0.5 × 0.5
Object Info

40
Source
Dropped by
Miscellaneous
"fishmeat_small_cooked"
“A small bit of cooked fish.”
–Wilson, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Fish and fire go well together.”
–Willow, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Looks better now.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“It will... tide... me over for now.”
–Wendy, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“CITRUS SPRITZING REQUIRED”
–WX-78, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Most nutritious.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Looks good to me.”
–Woodie, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“...Bottoms up.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Ah. It should be okay for me to consume it now.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“This meat will swim in my belly!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Boney.”
–Webber, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Is it snacktime?”
–Walani, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Could use fresh herbs and butter...”
–Warly, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“'Tis a bit better.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“FWOOSH'DED TEENY FISHY”
–Wilba, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Cute little belly stuff”
–Wormwood, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Swell. The bone is still in.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“I won't turn down a bite!”
–Winona, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“I do not wish to eat this fish.”
–Wortox, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“Glurgh... who do such thing!”
–Wurt, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“It smells good!”
–Walter, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
“I don't know why I took the time to cook something so small.”
–Wanda, when examining a Cooked Fish Morsel.
A Cooked Fish Morsel is a Fish Morsel that has been cooked over a Campfire, Fire Pit or Star. It can also be used in various Crock Pot recipes.
Small Fishy Jerky[edit | edit source]

Food Info
12.5
15
20

× 0.5 × 0.5
Object Info
15 Days
20
Miscellaneous
"fishmeat_small_dried"
“That fish is a real jerk.”
–Wilson
“It's fishy, real fishy.”
–Willow
“Is good source of fishy protein.”
–Wolfgang
“Withered away to almost nothing.”
–Wendy
“DESICCATED FISH FLESH”
–WX-78
“Salty, yet satisfying.”
–Wickerbottom
“Beats bird jerky.”
–Woodie
“My teeth are getting too old for this.”
–Maxwell
“Prövisiöns fit för a shört jöurney at sea.”
–Wigfrid
“It's really chewy, but we don't mind!”
–Webber
“A well-cured fish filet.”
–Warly
“Dry Glub Glub”
–Wormwood
“Smells like the sea.”
–Winona
“So delish, this dried fish!”
–Wortox
“Glurgh. Stinky.”
–Wurt
“A little jerky is better than none.”
–Walter
“A dry, tough piece of fish meat.”
–Wanda
Small Fishy Jerky is acquired by drying Fish Morsel on the Drying Rack. After 15 days, a Small Fishy Jerky spoils and turns into a Spoiled Fish Morsel.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Fish Morsels were added to Don't Starve Together in the Hook, Line, and Inker update.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Fishy Jerky concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.

A Fish Morsel was introduced to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is dropped by [[Fish]], [[Runty Guppy]], [[Needlenosed Squirt]], [[Bitty Baitfish]], [[Smolt Fry]], [[Scorching Sunfish]], [[Spittlefish]] and [[Crustashine]] when killed.

It counts as 0.5 [[Fishes]] and 0.5 [[Meats]] value when used in the [[Crock Pot]]. When spoiled, a Fish Morsel or Cooked Fish Morsel turns into a [[Spoiled Fish Morsel]].
